title: More than 120 families contacted as police investigate alleged abuse by Sydney childcare worker
summary_full: Police allege there are 136 victims of the man’s offending, which allegedly took place over a 16-year periodFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastAustralian federal police have contacted more than 120 families as they investigate alleged offending by a former Sydney childcare worker.The man, 35, has been charged with 329 offences allegedly committed over a 16-year period against 136 victims. Continue reading...
